title: viola irinae
intro: Viola irinae, also known as the yellow pansy or yellow violet, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the viola genus. It is native to Europe and Western Asia and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Viola irinae include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
